development_principles: LLMs label and translate intent; deterministic systems retrieve and compute.
Only approved pins are truth (Map is the interface).
Enrich Once, Read Forever (Frozen by default, versioned if refreshed).
Strict Taxonomy: AI outputs must match UI Icon sets exactly.
User edits never overwrite frozen AI enrichment.

pr_history.title: Roadmap: Reshape P3-E4 as model-agnostic headless planning API
pr_history.summary: Reshaped P3-E4 from CSV import/export into a model-agnostic headless planning API. Any LLM client (GPT, Gemini, Claude, in-app chat) drives a multi-pass loop: draft ImportRow[] → enriched PreviewRow[] with server-computed fields (distance, slot-hours, conflicts, energy) → LLM refines → user confirms → commit. 8 slices (A-H): contract + types, preview API, computed fields, commit API, LLM client prompt, export UI, import UI + in-app chat, verification gate.

pr_history.title: Consolidate docs into single source of truth
pr_history.summary: Rewrote CONTEXT.md as single source of truth. Deleted superseded IMPLEMENTATION.md, PHASE_2_UI_UX_REFACTOR_PLAN.md, UX_PIVOT_PLAN.md. Updated roadmap.json with P3-E3 completion statuses.

pr_history.title: Desktop split-panel layout for planner
pr_history.summary: Added layout prop (column/split) to ListPlanner. Desktop split: grid/backlog left, day detail right (400px). Responsive via useMediaQuery. Sticky header, showBackButton prop on PlannerDayDetail.

pr_history.title: Wire ListPlanner into PlannerShell + bug fixes
pr_history.summary: Wired existing ListPlanner into PlannerShell full-screen. Fixed unicode back button, slot label tooltips, orphan-items warning, tone system (data-map-tone). Visual polish via Cursor Composer.

pr_history.title: Add Playwright coverage for list filters and map linking
pr_history.summary: Added Playwright coverage for list tag filters and the map marker → list row focus + place drawer behavior.

pr_history.title: Add MapLibre pmtiles assets
pr_history.summary: Added pmtiles assets under public/map to support upcoming MapLibre map style experiments.

pr_history.title: Place type + tag filters with focused glow
pr_history.summary: Added separate place type and tag filter chip groups (icon-linked types, list-item tags) with OR-within/AND-across semantics, helper copy clarity, and focused list/place glow for map linking.

pr_history.title: Add lists link to map
pr_history.summary: Added a lightweight Lists link under the Omnibox so list management is discoverable without adding global navigation.

pr_history.title: Regenerate Supabase types
pr_history.summary: Regenerated Supabase types after the promote_place_candidate RPC signature added optional list assignment.

pr_history.title: Discovery omnibox UX loop + curated Wikipedia/Wikidata enrichment
pr_history.summary: Implemented the map-first UX loop (Search → Preview → Approve): added a floating Omnibox, Ghost Pin state, and an Inspector preview card that shows frozen enrichment before approval. Added deterministic curated Wikipedia/Wikidata extraction (summary, thumbnail, stable fact pairs) stored on enrichments.curated_data, updated ingest to return preview enrichment immediately, and added minimal Supabase types + a db:types generation helper.

pr_history.title: End-to-end auth + ingestion + detail view (plus promotion/map fixes)
pr_history.summary: Added Supabase magic-link auth + gating, implemented deterministic ingestion (Google Places + optional Wikipedia/Wikidata) into place_candidates, added strict normalization (LLM temp=0 optional with deterministic fallback), built place detail view with user notes/tags, and fixed promotion RPC + map pin parsing for end-to-end flow.

pr_history.title: Implement places_view + viewport persistence
pr_history.summary: Added places_view migration with computed lat/lng, updated MapContainer to read from the view, regenerated types, and implemented fitBounds/load persistence + approval flyTo behavior.

pr_history.title: Add JSON validation script and refresh roadmap progress
pr_history.summary: Added a JSON validation script in package.json and updated roadmap progress notes.

pr_history.title: Update roadmap status and progress
pr_history.summary: Refined roadmap statuses, progress summaries, and last_updated date.

pr_history.title: Refactor promotion logic and canonicalization
pr_history.summary: Moved promotion to a Postgres RPC and improved canonicalization for consistent JSON handling.

phase_1.name: The Smart Repository (Cupcake)
phase_1.goal: A deterministic, map-based database of approved places. Eliminates messy lists and taxonomy drift.
phase_1.progress_summary: Phase 1 MVP loop complete: auth-gated map, Omnibox ingestion (URL/place_id/name → place_candidates), Enriched Preview on Ghost Pins, and one-click Approve to canonical places. Enrichment is frozen at ingestion; promotion is a state transition only. Completed: places_view + map serialization and viewport persistence with fitBounds/last-view fallback, approval flyTo, lightweight search results + preview ingest, Inspector gated on preview state, lists schema + types, list CRUD UI, list assignment on approval, list-scoped tags + filters, and list membership editing from place detail + map drawer. Phase 2 is now underway.

epics.title: Strict Schema, Versioning & Deduplication
epics.description: Enforce data integrity and enrichment immutability before the first pin is dropped.

tasks.task: Create strict Enums and versioned enrichment schema.
tasks.details: Category Enum: ['Food', 'Coffee', 'Sights', 'Shop', 'Activity']. Energy Enum: ['Low', 'Medium', 'High']. Add fields: enrichment_version, enriched_at, enrichment_source_hash. Add curated_data JSONB for deterministic, non-LLM enrichment fields.
Constraint: UNIQUE(user_id, google_place_id). Re-adding a place opens edit view; enrichment is not re-run.
tasks.notes: Implemented dual deduplication: UNIQUE(user_id, source, source_id) + UNIQUE(user_id, dedupe_key). Transactional promotion RPC (promote_place_candidate) handles conflicts race-safely with ON CONFLICT. geohash7 and dedupe_key computed in DB to match table columns exactly.

tasks.details: Store raw opening_hours JSON from Google Places and source metadata for future deterministic filtering.
tasks.notes: place_candidates.raw_payload stores complete Google Places API response. places.opening_hours stores extracted opening_hours JSON.

tasks.details: Generate TypeScript types from the live Postgres schema (including views like places_view) to avoid hand-maintained table/enum drift.
tasks.notes: Added a minimal fallback Database type and wired enums to derive from it. Added `npm run db:types` to generate from SUPABASE_DB_URL (or `supabase gen types --local` when a local Supabase stack is running). Types regenerated after lists schema was added.

epics.title: The Librarian Agent (Deterministic Ingestion)
epics.description: Multi-source enrichment that is frozen, auditable, and schema-aligned.

tasks.details: Resolve via Google Places. Fetch nearby Wikipedia pages via GeoSearch. Select best match by distance + name similarity.
tasks.notes: Implemented Google Places Details + FindPlaceFromText, Wikipedia GeoSearch, and deterministic match selection. Added /api/places/ingest endpoint to create place_candidates from Google Maps URL, place_id, or name.

tasks.details: Pull summary, thumbnail, and structured facts via Wikidata when available. Store raw extracts.
tasks.notes: Implemented deterministic curated extraction for UI: Wikipedia summary + thumbnail (w/api.php extracts|pageimages), Wikipedia title selection via GeoSearch, Wikidata QID resolution (pageprops.wikibase_item), and a minimal stable fact-pair mapping (Founded P571, Architect P84, Elevation P2044, Website P856). Stored frozen curated output on enrichments.curated_data and returned it immediately from /api/places/ingest for preview.

tasks.details: LLM normalizes fetched data into enums and tags only. Prompt includes full enum list. Output must validate or be rejected.
tasks.notes: Normalization implemented with strict runtime validation + temperature=0 when OPENAI_API_KEY is configured, and a deterministic fallback mapping when not. Invalid outputs are rejected; model + prompt_version are stored for auditability.

tasks.details: Write enrichment once, mark as frozen. No AI calls during browsing, filtering, or planning.
tasks.notes: enrichments table with UNIQUE(source_hash, schema_version) enforces idempotency. place_candidates.enrichment_id links to frozen enrichments. Promotion RPC never triggers re-enrichment. Fixed: canonicalizeSnapshot() now properly recursive (preserves all nested keys). Fixed: Promotion moved to Postgres RPC for true transactional safety.

epics.title: Aligned Visual Interface
epics.description: UI that mirrors database truth exactly.

tasks.details: Map strict DB categories to SVG assets. Any unmapped enum is a build-time error.
tasks.notes: Icon mapping with build-time exhaustiveness check. SVG icons created for all categories. Test scaffolding validates enum coverage.

tasks.details: Display frozen AI tags and factual summaries. Allow user-added notes and user tags stored separately.
tasks.notes: Added /places/[id] route showing frozen enrichment + editable user_notes/user_tags (stored on places). Wired marker click → detail view, and added PATCH API for user meta updates.

epics.title: The Airlock (Visual Ingestion)
epics.description: A visual staging layer for items you already found. Enrichment happens at ingestion and is frozen on Ghosts; approval only promotes to canonical truth.

tasks.details: Zustand store for managing `ghosts` (candidates) and `selectedGhostId`.
tasks.notes: Ghosts are staged candidates with frozen enrichment from ingestion; selection drives Inspector preview.

tasks.details: Floating input accepting URL/text. Calls /ingest. Updates store (does not auto-promote). Exact-match should open canonical place detail instead of dropping a hidden ghost under a real pin.
tasks.notes: Ingest returns candidate + frozen enrichment for immediate preview.

tasks.details: Map layer for 'ghosts' (grey/hollow pins). Z-index > Map, < Real Pins.
tasks.notes: Ghost pins are intentionally visually distinct from canonical pins.

tasks.details: Preview card for Ghost Pins showing frozen enrichment. 'Approve Pin' triggers promotion RPC.
tasks.notes: Promotion is a state transition only; no enrichment or AI calls are triggered.

epics.title: Map View + Discovery Refinements (Phase 0-4 Plan)
epics.description: Harden map data integrity, viewport behavior, search/preview flow, and list persistence before planner work begins.

tasks.task: Add places_view to fix location serialization at the source.
tasks.details: Create a migration for public.places_view selecting id, user_id, name, category, created_at, and computed lat/lng via ST_Y/ST_X. Set security_invoker=true so RLS applies.

tasks.task: Update MapContainer to read from places_view.
tasks.details: Query places_view and map lat/lng directly (remove JSON parsing of geometry).

tasks.task: Regenerate Supabase types with places_view included.
tasks.details: Run db:types generation so the view appears in types (see Task 1.4).

tasks.task: Fit bounds on load when places exist.
tasks.details: If places.length > 0, compute bounds to include all pins and fit map view on load.

tasks.task: Persist and restore viewport when there are zero places.
tasks.details: Use last saved view from localStorage; otherwise fall back to a neutral global default.

tasks.task: Fly to approved places or refit bounds after approval.
tasks.details: After approval, flyTo the new place or refit bounds depending on context.
Return top-X candidates with minimal fields for quick listing.

tasks.task: Expand discovery store for search + preview.
tasks.details: Add results[], selectedResultId, previewCandidate, and previewEnrichment to the store.

tasks.task: Wire Omnibox results to preview ingest.
tasks.details: Render results list in the Omnibox; selecting a result triggers /api/places/ingest for preview.
Only render the InspectorCard when a preview candidate/enrichment exists.

tasks.task: Rename Add to Plan to Approve Pin until lists exist.
tasks.details: Update UI copy so approval remains explicit prior to list support.

tasks.task: Add lists + list_items schema and RLS.
tasks.details: Create list tables, relationships, and RLS policies for multi-tenant list persistence.
Build list management UI and allow assigning places to lists.

tasks.task: Assign lists on approval and show membership.
tasks.details: Update approval flow to assign to a list and show list membership in the place detail view.

phase_2.name: The Interactive Planner (Birthday Cake)
phase_2.goal: Stateful itinerary planning using deterministic logic only.

epics.title: Stateful Planning (Kanban)
features: Trip State Machine: Backlog -> Scheduled -> Done.
Backlog vs Scheduled is derived from scheduled_date (NULL = Backlog) and used as the single source of truth across Map + Kanban.
Drag-and-Drop between day buckets updates scheduling fields only.
Slot-only scheduling (MVP): Morning/Afternoon/Evening encoded as sentinel scheduled_start_time values (09:00/14:00/19:00).
Deterministic planner ordering: fixed category grouping per slot (Food -> Coffee -> Sights -> Activity -> Shop -> Drinks) and fractional ordering within (scheduled_date, slot, category) lanes.
Dependency: Drinks taxonomy (add Drinks to category_enum + icon mapping + deterministic normalization so bars map to Drinks).
If trip dates (lists.start_date/end_date) are unset, the planner disables day scheduling and prompts to set dates.
Scheduling actions never trigger enrichment or AI calls.
Optimistic scheduling reconciles conflicts on refresh; server remains source of truth.
Lightweight scheduling audit fields (last_scheduled_at, last_scheduled_by/source).
Visual distinction for scheduled vs unscheduled pins.

tasks.details: Use deterministic scheduled_start_time sentinels for morning/afternoon/evening lanes.
tasks.notes: Implemented in lib/lists/planner.ts with sentinel values 09:00/14:00/19:00 and slot parsing helpers.

tasks.details: Ensure category enum, icon mapping, and deterministic normalization map bar-like places to Drinks.
tasks.notes: Implemented in lib/types/enums.ts, lib/icons/mapping.ts, and lib/server/enrichment/normalize.ts.

tasks.details: PATCH /api/lists/[id] validates date range/timezone and moves out-of-range scheduled items to backlog.
tasks.notes: Implemented in app/api/lists/[id]/route.ts.

tasks.details: PATCH /api/lists/[id]/items/[itemId] updates scheduled_date/slot/order/completed_at and audit fields.
tasks.notes: Implemented in app/api/lists/[id]/items/[itemId]/route.ts.

tasks.task: Ship planner UI in map context panel.
tasks.details: Provide Places|Plan|Details flow with move picker, trip dates editing, and desktop drag/drop scheduling.
tasks.notes: Implemented in components/map/MapContainer.tsx and components/lists/ListPlanner.tsx.

tasks.task: Propagate scheduling state into map marker model and refresh contract.
tasks.details: Map marker state must include scheduled_date/scheduled_start_time/completed_at and refresh when planner mutates schedule.

tasks.task: Render explicit marker variants for backlog/scheduled/done.
tasks.details: Use deterministic map marker variants based on list item scheduling state while preserving focus/dim interactions.

tasks.task: Descope Playwright seeded acceptance for planner/map changes.
tasks.details: Temporarily relied on unit/API checks while seeding infra was removed; planner seeded coverage has since been partially restored.

epics.title: Deterministic Filtering & Intent Translation
features: Intent Extraction Agent outputs filter JSON only (never SQL).
Example: 'Quiet places' -> { "energy": "Low" }.
Filtering executed entirely via DB queries.
Filter JSON supports compound AND/OR rules from day one.
Open Now filtering uses server time converted to place timezone.
Cheap timezone strategy: derive IANA timezone from lat/lng offline at ingest; fallback to trip timezone or stored utc_offset_minutes.

tasks.task: Define server-owned filter JSON schema with runtime validation.
tasks.details: Implement category/energy/tags/open_now/within_list_id validation and deterministic boolean semantics.
POST /api/filters/translate allows LLM output only as validated filter JSON.
POST /api/filters/query executes deterministic DB filtering without LLM usage.

tasks.task: Defer open_now until timezone strategy is implemented.
tasks.details: Implement timezone storage and deterministic conversion before shipping open_now filtering.

epics.title: List Workspace + Tags
features: List detail view: click a list to open a scrollable list of saved places.
List-scoped tags per place, editable inline in the list view.
Tag filters scoped to a list; define multi-select semantics (AND/OR) explicitly.
Place type filter chips (icon-linked) rendered in a separate row from tags; OR within group, AND across groups.
List membership uses add/remove semantics (multi-list ready), not move semantics.
List detail view supports local search of canonical places with add-to-list actions.
Add-time tags can be provided and are unioned with seeded enrichment tags (stored on list_items.tags).
User tags are stored separately from frozen enrichment (no mutation of AI data).
Tag chips use a single editable set with per-chip remove + clear-all semantics; clearing persists an empty tag set.
Local search uses a deterministic contract with nullable display_address.
Local search accepts keyword input only and returns empty results for short queries.
List search results render in a portal to avoid drawer clipping.

tasks.details: PATCH/GET list tag endpoints, normalization, and deterministic filter behavior.
Deterministic list-local canonical place search and idempotent add contract.

tasks.task: Stabilize map/list linkage for list context.
tasks.details: List selection, place linkage semantics, and drawer-local list context behavior.

epics.title: Map-First List Context
features: Slate Glass overlay system for map UI (Omnibox, inspector, drawers, pills) while preserving overlay offsets. (done)
Lists render in a drawer/overlay so the map remains the primary interface. (done)
Selecting a list highlights/filters existing pins without refetching all places. (done)
Create list inline from the map drawer (reuse /api/lists). (done)
Search results are location-biased to the current map view (Find Place locationbias). (done)
Default map view prefers lastActiveListId or lastAddedPlaceId over global fitBounds. (done)
Place detail opens in a drawer driven by URL state to preserve deep links. (done)
Omnibox results stay above drawers via a predictable overlay layer (portal if needed). (done)
Creating or switching to an empty list must not change the map camera. (done)
Map shell includes a non-blocking sign-out affordance. (done)
Map marker click focuses the list row and opens the place drawer; list row click pans the map and opens the place drawer. (done)
Focused list row + place drawer share a subtle glow outline for visual linkage. (done)
MapLibre pmtiles assets staged under public/map for future map style swaps. (done)
MapLibre feasibility spike: provider flag + renderer split + provider-agnostic bounds + minimal style (PMTiles optional). (done)
PMTiles runtime fallback to Carto and dynamic overlay anchor resolution across style sources. (done)
Transit overlay (NYC GeoJSON lines + optional stations) with a right-overlay toggle and non-interactive layers. (done)
Map style selection: map-only dark style for Mapbox + MapLibre. (done)
Neighborhood boundaries (NYC GeoJSON) rendered as runtime overlays. (done)
Mobile state hierarchy: URL-driven place/list context overrides local Tools Sheet state. (done)

tasks.details: Resolve transit/neighborhood beforeId dynamically from loaded style layers and candidate anchors.
Fallback from PMTiles to Carto once per session on initial or runtime PMTiles style/source failure.
When URL/preview state is active on mobile, auto-close/suppress Tools Sheet without mutating URL params.

tasks.task: Close warm-glass Track B verification loop.
tasks.details: Run seeded E2E + manual QA pass for warm-glass readability and overlay budget behavior.

phase_3.name: The Intelligent Concierge (Wedding Cake)
phase_3.goal: Optimization and discovery without compromising trust.
phase_3.progress_summary: Routing + discovery suggestion layers shipped. UX pivot (Explore/Plan) in progress (MapInset 3.6 not started; polish 3.7 partial). P3-E4 reshaped as model-agnostic headless planning API: enriched import preview with server-computed fields (distance, slot-hours, conflicts) enabling any LLM client to drive a multi-pass planning loop.

epics.title: Deterministic Routing
features: Route Optimization via OSRM or Google Routes API.
Travel-time badges rendered between scheduled items.
LLMs are not involved in routing or timing.

tasks.details: Completion artifact required: docs/PHASE_3_ROUTING_CONTRACT.md defining request/response schema, invariants, and acceptance checks.
Provider-agnostic server interface and failure semantics; no client-side routing compute.

tasks.task: Define deterministic itinerary sequencing data model.
tasks.details: Inputs/outputs for ordered legs, durations, and travel-time badge rendering contract.

tasks.task: Define verification gate for routing contract slice.
tasks.details: Unit/API test matrix and acceptance criteria for deterministic route outputs.
Concrete adapter implementing RoutingPreviewProviderAdapter; reads OSRM_BASE_URL; calls /route/v1/driving/ with overview=false; returns per-leg distance_m/duration_s. Server-only.

tasks.task: Wire OSRM adapter into provider factory.
tasks.details: getRoutingPreviewProvider() returns createOsrmAdapter() when providerKind === 'osrm'. google_routes remains unimplemented.
useRoutingPreview(listId, date, enabled) calls POST /api/lists/{id}/routing/preview; exposes legs, legsByToItemId, summary, status, isLoading, error.

tasks.task: Render travel-time badges in ListPlanner UI.
tasks.details: ScheduledDayCard sub-component uses useRoutingPreview per day; renders TravelTimeBadge between consecutive scheduled items; skeleton on loading; day-level total summary.

epics.title: AI Discovery (Suggestion Layer)
features: Discovery uses deterministic search + filters first.
Optional AI summarization of discovered items (no sourcing).
Results are ingested through the Airlock pipeline and appear as Ghost Pins.
Approval promotes to canonical truth; no re-enrichment on approval.
Rejected items are discarded and never stored.

tasks.details: Completion artifact required: docs/PHASE_3_DISCOVERY_CONTRACT.md defining request/response schema, persistence boundaries, invariants, and acceptance checks.

tasks.task: Define verification gate for discovery contract slice.
tasks.details: Completion artifact required: docs/PHASE_3_DISCOVERY_VERIFICATION_GATE.md defining test matrix, command gate, and pass criteria.
Add POST /api/discovery/suggest with strict payload validation, canonical request shaping, deterministic retrieval/filter/ranking, and documented error mapping.

tasks.task: Implement optional summary path with ranking isolation.
tasks.details: Add include_summary support where summary text is optional and never influences deterministic ranking or filtering outputs.

tasks.task: Integrate suggestion layer into map discovery UI.
tasks.details: Wire suggest results into map-first discovery flow while keeping suggest read-only and preview as the first persistence point.

tasks.task: Ship reject/discard cleanup path for staged preview artifacts.
tasks.details: Ensure rejection discards preview-created candidate/enrichment artifacts when never promoted, preserving approve-as-truth semantics.
tasks.notes: Added discard_place_candidate RPC (candidate only; enrichments preserved), POST /api/places/discard, store discardAndClear; wired into cancelPreview, Omnibox Escape, previewResult, map click, panel close.

tasks.task: Add automated verification for discovery contract invariants.
tasks.details: Add unit/API coverage for contract validation, deterministic ordering, summary isolation, read-only suggest behavior, and reject-discard semantics.
tasks.notes: Added tests/discovery/reject-route.test.ts and discardAndClear tests in store.test.ts; updated verification gate and contract docs.

epics.title: UX Pivot — Two-Journey Architecture (Explore / Plan)
epics.description: Replace single WorkspaceContainer shell with Explore/Plan dual-journey architecture. Canonical UI is paper-themed on all viewports: ExploreShellPaper + PlannerShellPaper, PaperHeader journey tabs, responsive Explore panel. Legacy glass shells may remain in repo until removed. Architecture decisions documented in CONTEXT.md and DESIGN.md Section B.
features: Two-journey architecture: Explore (map + discovery) and Plan (CalendarPlanner + MapInset) as separate shells.
AppShell routes only Paper shells; mode switch via PaperHeader Map / Itinerary tabs on all breakpoints (URL ?mode=explore|plan).
CalendarPlanner: calendar-like day grid with drag-and-drop and day detail; dateless trips via day_index.
MapInset: Mapbox minimap in PlannerShellPaper with pins colored by day; pin click syncs selected day / focus.
Explore parity: PlannerListSwitcher toolbar, trip date subtitle in PaperExplorePanel, category chips tied to useTripStore.activeListTypeFilters.
Mobile Explore: PaperExplorePanel bottom sheet (peek / half / expanded) with map fitBounds padding tied to snap.
day_index column on list_items for dateless trip support.
Shared state layer: useTripStore (shared + planner selection fields), useDiscoveryStore (Explore), useNavStore (nav).
Color-coded time-of-day dots (warm=morning, neutral=afternoon, cool=evening).
Soft capacity warning when a day exceeds ~5 items.
Backlog is filterable and shows both unassigned and assigned items.

tasks.details: Product context, app shell layout, planner day grid spec, visual system (open), component inventory, Playwright selector contract.

tasks.task: Update planning docs (AGENTS.md, CONTEXT.md, roadmap.json, README.md, IMPLEMENTATION.md, PHASE_2_KANBAN_SPEC.md).
tasks.details: Align all planning docs with the new UI/UX direction. Mark old kanban spec as superseded.

tasks.task: Phase 0 — Foundation (schema + state extraction + API updates).
tasks.details: Added day_index column to list_items (nullable integer, backfill, CHECK constraint). Extracted useTripStore from WorkspaceContainer. Created useNavStore. Updated PATCH /api/lists/[id]/items/[itemId] to accept day_index. Updated PATCH /api/lists/[id] to backfill day_index ↔ scheduled_date on date add/remove.

tasks.task: Phase 1 — Shell Split (AppShell + ExploreShell + PlannerShell + navigation).
tasks.details: Created AppShell routing between ExploreShell (renamed WorkspaceContainer) and PlannerShell. Added NavRail (desktop) and NavFooter (mobile). Wired URL state (?mode=explore|plan).

tasks.task: Phase 2 — Planner Core (wired ListPlanner + desktop split-panel).
tasks.details: Wired existing ListPlanner into PlannerShell full-screen. Added layout prop (column/split) for responsive desktop split-panel (grid left, day detail right, 400px). Fixed unicode bug, slot labels, orphan warning, visual polish. Pragmatic reuse of existing ListPlanner instead of clean-sheet rebuild.

tasks.task: Phase 3 — Map Inset (Mapbox minimap in PlannerShell).
tasks.details: MapInset dynamic component in PlannerShellPaper: Mapbox GL, pins colored by scheduled day, onPinClick selects planner day and focused item. Lazy dynamic import. Glass PlannerShell path no longer primary.

tasks.task: Phase 4 — Polish + Cleanup (deprecate old components, E2E, doc updates).
tasks.details: PaperHeader data-testid tab buttons for Playwright; list-planner-move uses paper-header-tab-itinerary. DESIGN.md / README / CONTEXT aligned. Remaining: delete unused glass shell files or entry points, WorkspaceContainer alias removal, broader E2E for mobile sheet.

tasks.task: Paper shell on mobile + unified AppShell routing.
tasks.details: AppShell always renders ExploreShellPaper / PlannerShellPaper (no NavRail/NavFooter branch). PaperHeader tabs visible on all breakpoints with safe-area insets. PaperExplorePanel: right rail md+, bottom sheet <md. PlannerShellPaper responsive padding and map strip height polish.

PlannerListSwitcher under header with Trip label and onListSelect URL sync. Panel title/subtitle from active list + formatDateRange. CATEGORY_ENUM_VALUES chips in PaperExplorePanel toggling activeListTypeFilters. ListDrawer hideListSelectionChips when toolbar present.

epics.title: Headless Planning API (model-agnostic import/export interchange)
epics.description: Model-agnostic headless planning API that any LLM client (custom GPT, Gemini Gem, Claude skill, in-app chat) can drive via structured JSON rows. Server owns resolution, enrichment, and deterministic computation (distance, slot-hours, conflicts). LLM clients are replaceable intent-translation layers. Two-pass loop: draft rows → enriched preview → LLM refines with real-world data → user confirms → commit. User drives iteration count.
features: Export: surface existing POST /api/lists/[id]/export in the list/plan UI (CSV first; markdown/clipboard optional).
Export round-trip: optional CSV columns for stable ids (e.g. internal place UUID, Google place id) for re-import without text search.

Import preview API: POST /api/lists/[id]/import/preview accepts ImportRow[] JSON. Server resolves via Google (Maps URL, ChIJ place id, or free text), enriches, and returns PreviewRow[] with enrichment data + server-computed fields. No DB writes.

Server-computed fields on preview: open_during_slot (hours vs slot check), distance_from_previous_km (haversine on sequenced day items), travel_time_minutes (walking estimate), slot_conflict detection, energy_sequence warnings. All deterministic.
Trip summary in preview response: total_days, empty_slots list, global warnings (e.g. 'Day 2 has no morning activity').
Import commit API: POST /api/lists/[id]/import/commit with confirmed row indices. Runs ingest → frozen enrichment → promote_place_candidate with list_id. Idempotent for existing canonical places.
Dedupe: prefer attaching to existing canonical places (source_id / google_place_id) instead of duplicate candidates.

Model-agnostic client contract: any LLM client needs only the ImportRow JSON schema, valid enum values, slot time ranges, and instructions to read/refine preview responses. No API keys, DB knowledge, or enrichment internals.

Non-goals (v1): LLM or client writing directly to DB; skipping enrichment; auto-committing ambiguous matches; import as separate source of truth; real-time transit APIs (use haversine + walking estimate).
In-app chat (future slice): first-party LLM chat UI wired to preview/commit, enabling conversational trip planning within the app.
invariants: LLMs label and translate intent; deterministic systems retrieve and compute.
Preview is read-only — no DB mutations until explicit commit.
Commit reuses existing ingest → enrich → promote pipeline (no parallel write path).
Server-computed fields are deterministic and reproducible for same inputs.
Strict taxonomy: LLM-suggested categories must be valid CategoryEnum values; server corrects or rejects.
Contract is model-agnostic: no assumption about which LLM drives the loop.

tasks.details: Full interchange contract: ImportRow schema, PreviewRow with enrichment + computed fields, CommitRequest/Response, error codes, slot time ranges, enum values, invariants, non-goals. Follow conventions from PHASE_3_ROUTING_CONTRACT.md.

ImportRow, ImportPreviewRequest/Response, PreviewRow, ResolvedEnrichment, ComputedFields, ImportCommitRequest/Response, error types. Follow patterns from lib/routing/contract.ts. Include request parser with unknown-key rejection.

POST /api/lists/[id]/import/preview. Parse ImportRow[] body, validate schema, resolve each row via Google (reuse findGooglePlaceIdFromText / parsePlaceIdFromGoogleMapsUrl from ingest), fetch enrichment, return PreviewRow[] without computed fields initially. Auth + RLS. Row cap for v1 (e.g. 25).

tasks.task: Add open_during_slot + distance_from_previous + travel_time to preview.
tasks.details: Pure functions in lib/import/compute.ts: parseOpeningHours (Google format → structured), isOpenDuringSlot (hours + date + slot → boolean), haversineDistance (coords → km), estimateWalkingTime (distance → minutes). Wire into preview response. Unit-testable, no external calls.

tasks.task: Add slot_conflict + energy_sequence + trip_summary to preview.
tasks.details: Detect same-slot collisions, flag 3+ consecutive high-energy items, compute empty_slots from trip date range. Add trip_summary to response. Pure functions, unit-testable.

POST /api/lists/[id]/import/commit with confirmed row indices or preview token. For each row: ingest candidate if needed, promote_place_candidate with list_id, PATCH list_items for scheduled_date/slot/tags. Idempotent for existing places. Auth + RLS.

tasks.task: Write reference system prompt for LLM clients (docs/LLM_PLANNING_CLIENT_PROMPT.md).
tasks.details: Model-agnostic system prompt / instruction doc containing: ImportRow JSON schema, valid CategoryEnum and PlannerSlot values with time ranges, slot semantics, how to read PreviewRow responses, how to reason over computed fields (distance, hours, energy), example request/response cycle. Portable to GPT Actions, Gemini extensions, Claude skills.

tasks.task: Ship list CSV export in UI.
tasks.details: Discoverable control in list/plan shell. Client calls POST /api/lists/[id]/export with format csv and triggers file download. Server path already exists.
tasks.notes: Server path exists: app/api/lists/[id]/export/route.ts + lib/export/serialize-csv.ts.

tasks.details: Optional ExportRow fields (place_id UUID, google_place_id) in lib/export/contract.ts + serialize-csv.ts. Update tests under tests/export/.

tasks.task: Ship import UI (upload / paste → preview → confirm).
tasks.details: Wizard or modal: file upload and/or paste; call preview API; render table with enrichment + computed warnings; ambiguous row pickers; confirm calls commit API; refresh list/planner state. Mobile + desktop. Reuse DESIGN.md tokens.

Chat interface wired to preview/commit APIs. System prompt from 4.7 drives the LLM. User converses naturally; LLM outputs ImportRow JSON; app calls preview and renders enriched results inline; user confirms to commit. Model-selectable or provider-agnostic backend.
Unit tests: CSV/JSON parsing, validation, computed fields (haversine, hours parsing, slot checks). API tests: preview happy path + error modes, commit idempotency. Document in interchange doc.
